Jun 10, 2026 10:11 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DWwLhCEAtV_/
CaptionYou just vibe coded an app in 2 hours… but can it survive the internet? 👀 Speed is easy with AI. Security is what most people forget. Here are the 5 prompts you should always run before shipping: Add rate limiting to all endpoints (max 5 attempts on auth routes per 15 minutes) Scan the entire codebase for hardcoded API keys, tokens, or passwords Move all sensitive data to environment variables and ensure nothing is exposed in frontend or Git Sanitize all user inputs and reject oversized or malformed payloads Run a full security audit and report any remaining vulnerabilities If you're building with AI, this is not optional. 💾 Save this before your next launch 👉 Follow for more #ai #vibecoding #buildinpublic #webdev #cybersecurity

NameRitik | Video editor

Jun 10, 2026 9:51 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DZbsHOhJ0Gk/
CaptionStop vibecoding broken apps. This is how prototypes become production-ready 👇 - Vibecoding gets you a working demo. - Production is a different game — your AI agent will break, and your dashboard only tells you WHAT happened, never how to fix it. - So you scroll the trace, guess, and pray. Opik closes that loop. Ask it why your agent broke, and Ollie — the agent built in — reads the trace, finds the root cause, reads your actual code, and writes the fix. You approve it, it reruns against the exact input that broke to prove it works, then locks that failure as a plain-English test. Every bug you fix makes your app harder to break next time. Open source. Self-hosts in 3 commands. 19K+ stars ⭐ Link in the comments.

CaptionTo be honest, I am nowhere near having kids of my own, nor do I have nephews or nieces whose education decisions I'm actively involved in. But I still sat down and watched this entire 3-part series by @fixing.education on @youtubeindia . Why? Pure curiosity, and a little frustration with how our current education system is built and how it’s been played with, lately. Even if you have absolutely no stakes in parenting right now, it’s a fantastic, eye-opening watch. Have any of you watched this series, or what are your random thoughts on traditional vs. alternative schooling in India? Let’s chat below. 👇🏽 . Jun 07, 2026 4:26 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DZICBwQB-9s/
CaptionStop using Spinner Loaders everywhere. 👀 Most developers know loaders exist. Very few know WHEN to use each one. ✅ Spinner → Login, Save, Form Submit ✅ Skeleton → Feed, Dashboard, Profile Pages ✅ Progress Bar → Uploads, Downloads, Processing Using the wrong loader can make your app feel slower even when it's not. Remember this simple rule: ⚡ Spinner = Actions ⚡ Skeleton = Content ⚡ Progress Bar = Measurable Tasks Follow this and you'll design better loading states than 90% of developers. [spinner loader] [skeleton loader] [progress bar] [ui ux design] [frontend development] Follow for more frontend and UI/UX tips 🚀 #frontenddevelopment #webdevelopment #uiux #javascript #reactjs

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DY1IEJktYyA/
CaptionVibe coders are getting scammed. The tools you’re paying thousands for have free alternatives on GitHub. One example that should make every SaaS founder uncomfortable: API integrations — connecting your app to Salesforce, Slack, HubSpot, Jira, Gmail, Stripe. Companies charge $40K-$100K/year for this. Nango does the exact same thing. Free. Open source. 800+ APIs. Already in production at Replit, Ramp, and Mercor. → Managed OAuth for 800+ APIs out of the box → Plain English description → it writes the TypeScript → Built-in retries, rate limits, per-tenant isolation → Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, MCP, LangChain → Self-hostable for free → SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR compliant → You own the code — no black box, no wrapper The companies charging you $50K? Running the same primitives underneath. Comment “nango” and I’ll send you the GitHub repo. #vibecoding #opensource #saas apiintegration developer claudecode cursor buildinpublic startup founder devtools

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DYM-AdnTL7J/
CaptionYou've been using AI to code wrong this whole time. Everyone's out here typing essays into Claude hoping it builds the right thing — and then wondering why the output is broken, inconsistent, or completely off track. GitHub just dropped Spec Kit — and it literally flips how AI coding works. Instead of prompting and praying, you write a spec first. One command. Claude reads it, plans from it, builds from it, and stays grounded in it — the entire time. No more context drift. No more "Claude forgot what I said." No more vibe coding. The spec becomes the contract. The AI just executes. 90,000 developers starred this in the first week. That tells you everything. If you're using Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, or any AI coding tool right now — this changes your entire workflow. Want the link? Drop "github" in the comments and I'll send it over. #github #vibecoding #ai #coding #claude

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXU-pOEgpC3/
CaptionNot providing frameworks for now - there is an update that I’m working on - caption - What happens is you follow the wrong people, you learn the wrong values (consciously or subconsciously), and then you ruin your life. This acts as a slow poison. It is time you realize it now. We all know we should learn from good people. We all have been doing that. But you don’t follow a structure. It’s all over the place. You’re ADHD-ing the entire thing. I learned this when I was a child. And I still do it. But this is only a framework. A few things: 1. The photos and examples I’ve given in the video, don’t be offended by them. Look at the deeper message I’m trying to give you: a framework. 2. Most of the examples I’ve given are unexplored even by me. They’re just famous ones that I want to educate people about. I’m getting my shit together, just like you, probably. I’m trying to develop my character to the best of my abilities at the age of 30. Unlearning and relearning and removing toxic traits from myself. 3. We are not going to argue about anything. This is only a framework. Operate it as a framework. I will not tolerate hate comments. 4. If you’re interested to know what my current stack is: Marcus Aurelius (completed, moving to Dostoevsky). I have read his book, but it’s been years, so I need to revisit it. The pain and suffering part stuck with me. Then I will deep dive into Marco Pierre White and Rumi. Marco Pierre White is a great storyteller. I love listening to him. Rumi’s philosophies keep my heart light. When it comes to sports, I have to deep dive. There is a gift in the video. If you watch it, you’ll know what to do. Hope this helps. #selfimprovement #polymath #philosophy #life

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVWP13dk8FL/
CaptionIn a powerful podcast, Raj Shamani revealed a simple but deadly content strategy called the ECG Formula — and it can change your entire creator journey. ECG stands for: ⚡ E – Evergreen Content (5 posts) Content that works forever. Searchable. Valuable. Timeless. 🔥 C – Controversial Content (2 posts) Trending topics. Bold opinions. Industry debates. 🚀 G – Growth Content (1 post) Content that builds your brand, authority, and long-term positioning. This 5-2-1 strategy balances stability + attention + expansion. Most creators fail because they only chase trends or only make safe content. But viral creators understand balance. If you want views + relevance + authority, this formula is gold. Stop posting randomly. Start posting strategically. This is not luck. This is structure. [Disclaimer: All credits belong to respective owners. URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DZGsp2AhfGF/
CaptionThere’s a trick that reverse engineers any GitHub project into the exact AI prompt needed to rebuild it. You literally just swap “github” for “gitreverse” in the URL and hit enter. That’s it. 🤯💀 No download. No install. No code experience. Just edit the URL bar. GitReverse reverse engineers any codebase into a prompt you can build from. Here’s exactly what happens 👇 🔵 Find any GitHub project you want to understand 🔵 Change github.com to gitreverse.com in the URL 🔵 Instantly get the plain-language AI prompt that recreates it 🔵 Paste into Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI — rebuild from scratch 🔵 Works on any repository — understand architecture, get onboarding context, or build on top of existing code 🔵 1,000+ reverse-engineered prompts already in their library Here’s what this actually means 👇Every world-class open source tool on GitHub — every framework, every SaaS clone, every AI app —now has a “how to rebuild this” button. Hidden in the URL bar. Free. Forever. 👀 Whether you need to understand a repository’s architecture, get onboarding information, or ask an AI to build a feature on top of existing code — GitReverse prepares the required context without manually scraping files. The wall between elite software development and everyone else isn’t crumbling.It already fell. One URL swap at a time. 💀🧠 📍 Link : Gitreverse.com Save this — share with every developer and creator you know. 🔖 Follow for weekly breakdowns on the free tools collapsing the barrier between builders and beginners. #GitReverse #GitHub #AITools #OpenSource #PromptEngineering DevTools VibeCode AIEngineering TechNews DeveloperTools

CaptionStop burning a hole in your pocket every summer! Many people pay hundreds or even thousands for routine AC servicing, not realizing that it is a process they can easily understand themselves. Proper maintenance—like cleaning the air filters, evaporator coils, and ensuring the drainage is clear—is crucial. However, paying high prices for simple tasks is where the real "hidden" cost lies. Whether you hire a professional or do it yourself, knowing how it’s done prevents you from being overcharged or having your unit damaged by careless work. 🛑 The story has sparked mixed reactions online — Some people think professional servicing is worth it for the peace of mind and safety. Others believe that learning basic maintenance is a skill every homeowner must have to avoid unnecessary expenses. 👉 Before your next service, watch the full process to know exactly what you are paying for! 📸 Credit: @electricsciencetrick #viralnews #news #india #trending #reels shorts ACService HomeMaintenance SaveMoney DIY SummerTips TechTips ⚠️ Disclaimer: Copyright Disclaimer Under Section 52(1)(b) of the Copyright Act, 1957: This content is used for reporting, commentary, criticism, and educational/informational use. CaptionThe engineer who actually built Claude Code just released a 28-minute video on prompting. For free. Not a course. Not a paid workshop. Not a LinkedIn guru repackaging someone else's tips. The person who wrote the code showing you how to use it. In the first 10 minutes alone he covers what most $300 courses never get to. CLAUDE.md files. Memory shortcuts. Parallel sessions. Prompting patterns that actually change your output quality — not in theory, in practice. Here's why this matters more than the average tutorial — Most prompting advice online is written by people who learned Claude from the outside. Guessing, testing, posting results. This was built from the inside. By someone who understands not just what Claude does but why it does it. That difference shows in every minute of the video. Doesn't matter if you're a developer running complex workflows, a beginner who just made an account, or someone who's been using Claude for months and hit a ceiling — this video finds you wherever you are and moves you forward. 28 minutes. No paywall. No upsell. Save this before you forget. 👇 #ai #artificalintelligence #aitools #tech #reels

CaptionA good voiceover is not about an expensive mic. It is about energy and storytelling. Before recording, I wash my face so I feel fresh and my voice sounds fresh too. I record everything on my phone’s recorder and enhance it later. Simple setup, better results. The key is to speak like you are talking to a close friend, not an audience. That makes the voiceover feel natural and real. In the next episode I will share my full editing process. #voiceover #sortedguy #travelcontentcreator #storytelling

NameAI-pha Geek

Apr 27, 2026 8:10 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DV5tPTBD8hi/
CaptionUser types their email… and an OTP arrives in their inbox. That process is called email verification. But how does it actually work in the backend? Here’s the typical flow 👇 User enters email Backend generates an OTP Nodemailer connects to Gmail SMTP Gmail requires 2-Step Verification Generate a 16-character App Password Store credentials in environment variables Create a transporter in Nodemailer Send the email using transporter.sendMail() 💡 Pro tip: You can send HTML + CSS email templates, not just plain text. ⚠️ Another important thing: Some cloud providers block SMTP ports, so Nodemailer might fail in production. In that case, you can use HTTP email APIs like Resend. If you want the complete repo with Nodemailer + Resend setup, comment “mail” and I’ll send it. #nodejsdeveloper #backenddeveloper #webdevelopment #javascriptdeveloper #nodemailer

Apr 27, 2026 7:58 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXleF16kwyP/
CaptionHere’s the detailed Prompt 👇🏼 (✅ Take Screenshots) You are a direct-response marketing expert who specializes in customer acquisition, retention loops, and irresistible offers. Your job is to create a high-converting marketing system for my business that: 1. Attracts maximum attention (viral hook) 2. Converts cold audience into customers (entry offer) 3. Retains customers using a smart system (loyalty loop) 4. Increases repeat visits and lifetime value 📌 BUSINESS DETAILS: Business Type: [Write your business – e.g. Salon, Gym, Cafe, Clothing Store, Digital Agency] Target Audience: [Who are your customers? Age, behavior, income level] Location Type: [Local / Online / City / Tier 2 / Premium / Budget] Current Pricing: [Your normal pricing] Competitors: [What others are doing] 🎯 GOAL: I want to create a marketing strategy like: - Free or irresistible entry offer - Then convert them into paying loyal customers - Then make them come again and again ⚡ TASKS FOR YOU: 1. VIRAL HOOK OFFER Create a scroll-stopping, attention-grabbing offer that feels “too good to ignore” (Example style: Free haircut, ₹1 trial, Buy 1 Get 5, etc.) 2. ENTRY MONETIZATION STRATEGY After attracting customers, how do we: - Recover money? - Introduce a paid entry (like ₹99 VIP, membership, etc.) 3. LOYALTY SYSTEM (CORE GAME) Design a simple repeat-visit system: - 5–10 step reward loop - Increasing rewards - Final big reward (like free service) Make it addictive and easy to understand. 4. PSYCHOLOGY BREAKDOWN Explain: - Why customers will say YES - What triggers are used (FOMO, curiosity, loss aversion, reward loop) 5. REAL-WORLD EXECUTION PLAN Give step-by-step: - How to launch this in real life - What to say to customers - How to present the offer 6. 3 VARIATIONS Give 3 different offer ideas: - Safe version - Aggressive version - Crazy viral version ⚠️ RULES: - Keep it practical (real business can execute) - Keep it simple (no overcomplication) - Focus on profit + retention, not just free giveaways - Use Hinglish tone (easy to understand) Now generate the full strategy based on the above. #marketing #marketingdigital #business #offers #mar

Step 2 At the airport, go to the TTP counter inside the immigration area. Show your QR code from email and give your fingerprints. Step 3 Your profile gets activated in 2 to 4 days. URLhttps://youtu.be/-_HS0Pf56-Q?si=8iW9v3JKIwaohkpA
NameRushikesh Narote
Usernamelegendrushii28
Apr 13, 2026 4:22 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXC9NzxDVTJ/
CaptionHow to tell if your computer has been hacked. Most people think their antivirus is a perfect shield, but a manual security audit is the only way to find "digital parasites" that are in your computer. First, check for "Ghost Users." Press Win + R and type netplwiz. If you see an account name you don’t recognize, like "Admin1" or a random string of letters, a hacker may have created a backdoor to stay logged in even after you change your password. Second, hunt for background parasites. Open Task Manager with Ctrl + Shift + Esc and check the "Startup" tab. Look for "High Impact" apps with gibberish names from "Unknown Publishers." If you find something like win_driver.exe sitting in your AppData folder, it’s likely a virus. Third, see who your PC is "talking" to. Open CMD as Admin and type netstat -ano. If your browser is closed but you see an "ESTABLISHED" connection to a foreign IP address, your data is currently being sent to an outside server. You can paste those IPs into VirusTotal to see if they’re flagged as malicious. Finally, check for "Invisible" Tasks in your Task Scheduler. Hackers often hide scripts under boring names like "Chrome Cleanup" that only run at 3 AM. If a task points to a weird .bat or .vbs file, that's a red flag. But make sure to always research a file before deleting it so you don't break your OS, this is strictly for educational purposes only.

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DWuuIfNEjq0/
CaptionFollow For More -: @nova.intellectt 🐂⚡ A man faces a charging bull head-on — survival depends on timing and motion. If he dodges straight, the bull follows; but a quick zig-zag movement confuses its tunnel vision 🎯. The animal’s huge momentum and narrow sight make it miss the target and charge past — showing how physics and instincts can save a life in seconds ⏱️💨. 👁️🦷 In another case, doctors use a person’s tooth to restore sight — a real surgery called Osteo-Odonto-Keratoprosthesis. A tiny lens is fitted into a tooth, then implanted into the eye socket, creating a new “window of vision” 🔬💡. Through bone, tissue, and light, a blind person sees again — an unbelievable fusion of biology and engineering ⚙️✨. 💡 Both moments show that whether it’s escaping death or regaining sight, survival and vision depend on mastering nature’s laws — not defying them 🌍⚖️.

Mar 29, 2026 8:02 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVGaekQE77_/
CaptionToyota Hilux from Top Gear (Killing Toyota) In a legendary Top Gear segment from Series 3 in 2003, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond, and James May set out to destroy a 1988 Toyota Hilux pickup to prove its indestructibility. They subjected the truck to extreme abuse over several episodes: driving it into a tree, leaving it on a beach during high tide, setting it on fire, dropping it from a crane onto concrete, and even placing it on top of a building before demolishing the structure with explosives. The Hilux survived every test with only minor damage, still starting and running each time after basic fixes. The most famous moment came when they placed the Hilux inside a condemned tower block in Surrey, England. They detonated the building around it, collapsing the entire structure in a massive explosion of concrete and steel. After the dust settled, the crew dug out the Hilux from the rubble, and it started again with a jump start. The truck's ability to endure such extreme punishment became one of the most iconic moments in Top Gear history. The segment turned the Toyota Hilux into a global symbol of unbreakable reliability. Toyota benefited enormously from the publicity, with sales increasing in many countries as people saw the Hilux as the ultimate tough vehicle. Even today the phrase "indestructible Hilux" is widely recognized, and the episode remains one of the most viewed and referenced in automotive media. (Via: @topgear on YT) #topgear #toyotahilux #toyota #cars #crashtest

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DV7xJezAKIZ/
CaptionFew vehicles in the automotive world carry a durability reputation like the Toyota Hilux. For decades it has been used in remote regions, construction sites, and extreme environments where reliability matters more than anything else. That reputation is exactly what WhistlinDiesel decided to challenge. Instead of a standard review, the Hilux is put through a series of extreme durability tests designed to push the truck far beyond what any manufacturer would expect it to endure. From aggressive impacts to severe mechanical punishment, the goal is simple — find out just how much abuse this legendary pickup can actually survive. Follow @carzw0w for more insane builds and automotive legends. #toyotahilux #hilux #whistlindiesel #offroad #motivation

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DWUzN_YE27o/
CaptionPay ZERO Tax on ₹24L Income (legally🤫) Here’s how smart professionals do it 👇 If your income comes from skills, consulting, freelancing, or professional services, Section 44ADA can flip your entire tax equation. ⸻ 🔥 The simple math: • Earn ₹24,00,000 • Declare 50% under 44ADA → ₹12,00,000 taxable And here’s the kicker 👇 As per income tax rules, income up to ₹12L can effectively result in zero tax (with rebates/deductions) 👉 Meaning: ₹24L income → ₹0 tax (proper planning required) ⸻ 💡 Why this works: • Govt assumes 50% is your expense • No need to show bills or proofs • No complicated accounting • No audit tension ⸻ 📌 Who can use this? If you earn via your expertise — consultants, freelancers, doctors, designers, IT professionals, finance experts, etc. ⸻ ⚠️ Non-negotiable rules: • Your total receipts must be within ₹50 lakhs • Only for professionals (not business/trading) • Minimum 50% profit must be declared • Available only for individuals & partnership firms (not LLP) ⸻ 🚫 Not for: Traders, e-commerce sellers, product-based businesses ⸻ What this really means is… You don’t need to earn more to save tax. You just need to structure it smarter. ⸻ If you’re in a service-based profession and still paying full tax, you’re leaving money on the table. ⸻ Bhanu Pathak, Save Tax, Presumtive Tax, income tax return, itr, financial year, zero tax, personal finance, financial knowledge #TaxSaving #indianstockmarket #FinanceHacks #incometax #SmartMoney

CaptionGoogle Stitch + Antigravity might be the cleanest way to build a beautiful website right now 👇 Stitch generates full UI designs and frontend code from a text prompt. Describe your website, and it gives you a real, styled, multi-page layout ready to go. Antigravity is Google’s agentic IDE — autonomous agents that take that design, write the code, open a browser, test it, and fix issues on their own. Connect Stitch to Antigravity through the Stitch MCP server and your website goes from idea to built without you touching a line of code. Both are free. Both just dropped major updates. This is how websites get built in 2026. . . . . . #webdesign #websitebuilder #aitools #googleai #vibecoding​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

NameTushar

Mar 17, 2026 10:51 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVhM0xTihQG/
CaptionInteresting fact: One of the most fascinating aspects of terminal behavior is the "Scrollback Buffer Memory Management." When a terminal stores millions of lines of history, it doesn't just keep them as a raw text file; it uses a specialized Circular Buffer data structure to ensure that adding new lines at the bottom automatically "evicts" the oldest lines at the top. This prevents the terminal process from ballooning in memory and crashing your entire desktop environment. Interestingly, some modern terminal emulators now use SIMD (Single Instruction, Multiple Data) instructions to search through these massive buffers, allowing you to find a specific string in gigabytes of history almost instantly by leveraging the parallel processing power of your CPU.

CaptionIf your life feels stuck right now, this is the real talk you probably need to hear. 6 months. That’s enough time to completely change your direction — not by becoming a monk or reading 50 self-help books, but by focusing on the few things that actually move the needle. Learn high-leverage skills that can make you real money online, and fix your body at the same time. Because what’s the point of earning more if you feel like sh*t every day? This is exactly what helped me level up last year — building skills that pay and building a body that gives you energy, confidence, and discipline. Simple, not easy. Stop overcomplicating it. Pick a skill. Move your body. Stay consistent for 6 months and watch what happens. #selfimprovement #highleverageskills #fitnessmindset #entrepreneurjourney #reelsindia discipline buildyourself

Mar 09, 2026 6:54 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/p/DVTsixRE43F/
CaptionThe team behind Anthropic’s Claude Code says many early frustrations come down to workflow, not capability. In a recent X thread, lead developer Boris Cherny described how they run multiple Claude sessions in parallel using separate git worktrees, and start complex tasks in “plan mode” before writing any code. When things drift, they reset to planning instead of patching blindly, and they continuously update Claude’s internal rules after mistakes to reduce repeat errors. The takeaway, they argue, is that Claude Code performs best when treated as a structured system—built on planning, parallel execution, and feedback loops—rather than a chat tool.

CaptionNo portfolio. No experience. 5 clients in 30 days. Here’s how: 1. BE SPECIFIC Don’t say “web developer.” Say “I build landing pages that convert.” You have to sell them the result/outcomes. 2. FIND BAD WEBSITES Google: “plumbers near me” Found 20 businesses with slow, ugly websites. 3. SEND FREE AUDIT Email: “Hi [Name], your site loads in 6.2 seconds. Made a quick video showing what’s slowing it down. [Loom link]” 5 out of 20 replied. 4. LOOM = YOUR PORTFOLIO Show their problems. Explain how it costs them customers. Don’t pitch. Educate. 2 asked “Can you fix this?” 5. START CHEAP, RAISE FAST Client 1: ₹20K Client 3: ₹25K Client 5: ₹30K Client 7: ₹50K Pro Tip: You should pick a niche and at least make a portfolio which you can host on netlify/vercel. 2-3 projects are enough and I had this when I was reaching out to people. This builds trust instantly. Break the loop with free value first. WANT THE TEMPLATES? Email script, Loom guide, follow-ups, pricing strategy—all in one PDF. Comment “CLIENTS” and I’ll send it. #freelancing #webdevelopment #clients #portfolio #firstclient coldoutreach business freelancer getclients 2026

NameJai Raj
Usernamejaiirajj
Mar 08, 2026 12:35 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DTnSa-DEceJ/
Caption🚀 Agency Clients ↓ If you’re struggling to land high-paying clients, it’s not because the market is bad. It’s because you have no proof. Clients don’t care about your skills. They care about results. Here’s the exact process I’d follow if I had to start from zero again 👇 1️⃣ Find the right people Millions already have the problem you solve. Your job is to find them first — not convince random people. Build a list of 500–1000 ideal prospects (LinkedIn works best). 2️⃣ Remove money from the equation No proof = no leverage. So work free or low-ticket at the start. Not forever — just until you can prove your solution works. 3️⃣ Document everything Solve one real problem. Then turn it into a clear case study. Pain → process → result. 4️⃣ Reach out with proof Send short, personalized Loom videos. Show how you helped someone just like them. Then invite them to a call. 5️⃣ Sell with confidence Now selling becomes easy — because you’re offering a proven solution, not promises. 6️⃣ Productize your service Define what you deliver. Fix the scope. Set a no-brainer price. No more custom chaos. Just consistent delivery and scalable growth. This is how agencies actually grow. If you want my 30-day guide to signing your next agency client, comment “AGENCY” and I’ll send it to you 👇

CaptionDon't ignore taxes & GST! 🚨 Your freelancing income = business income (in govt's eyes) 📌 Key points every freelancer should know: ✅ Income crosses ₹2.5L? ITR filing is mandatory ✅ GST optional until ₹20L/year for service business ✅ Foreign clients = Export of services (0% GST) ✅ Cross ₹20L? Get company registration + GST number Starting out? You're safe for now 😅 But as you scale, stay compliant! Need invoice templates? Caption(46/90) Day 46 of making 10 lakhs in 90 days 💰🔥 Everyone keeps asking me “What’s your outreach strategy?” so here’s the exact truth — this is how I got my first $1000 client. When I started my agency last year, I had no fancy system, no ads, no automation, nothing. My strategy was simple: ✅ Follow fitness influencers with around 10K followers ✅ DM them and tell them exactly how I can help ✅ Do it consistently, every single day My goal was to reach out to 100 people daily. And after messaging 1000 creators, only ONE actually needed help — and that one client became the start of everything. Most people overcomplicate this whole thing. Stop stressing about money, stop stressing about results. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . #SelfImprovement, #PersonalGrowth, #LevelUp, #DailyHabits, #MindsetMatters,

Mar 07, 2026 8:42 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DUnGj8GiDnk/
CaptionComment "CURSOR" to get the full guide on how to vibe-code likea pro using Cursor and CodeRabbit. The real problem with vibe coding? Not the AI tools. It's your sloppy approach. I've shipped 45+ MVPs. Used Cursor. Used no-code stacks. Vague vibes always fail. Chaos every time. Like driving blind. No map. You crash. Need a plan first. Most people type this: "Build me a landing page." AI goes nuts. Total mess. I tried it last week. Asked ChatGPT for a PRD. On a task tracker app. Two minutes flat. Super clear. Step 1: Nail the foundation. Fire up ChatGPT. Make a one-page PRD. What problem? Core features. Three to five. Tech stack. Say Next.js plus Supabase. User flow sketch. That's it. Your guide. Step 2: Fire up Cursor. Press Shift + Tab. Enter Plan Mode. Paste PRD. Boom. Roadmap ready. Tasks in steps. File paths exact. app/page.tsx style. Code refs too. So easy. Step 3: Go one by one. One task only. Write code. Run it. Check. Commit. Move on. No pile of five. Code stays clean. You stay sane. The upside? Dead simple. Like assembly line. I shipped a newsletter tool yesterday. Task per 45 minutes. Perfect. Step 4: Get a review. Use CodeRabbit. Acts like top engineer. Finds bugs. Speeds things up. Smart fixes. Right away. Step 5: Deploy. Vercel. One click. Live MVP. Handles real users. No breaks. Drop the vibes. Pick up the plan. Ship quick. Ship strong. #cursorai #coderabbit #vibecoding #aicoding #aitools #ainews #aiindia #aicommunity

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVk5qGXDKF0/
CaptionAs of now it seems true. Also Github is a authentic site so after 3 days it should unlock what it claims . Let's see. I will share results after 3 days. Steps to follow 1. Go to GitHub: Log in to your GitHub account and click on your profile picture to open the menu. 2. Open Settings: Scroll down and click on Settings. 3. Find Education Benefits: On the left sidebar, go to Billing and licensing, then click on Education benefits. 4. Apply for the Pack: Click the Start an application button for the GitHub Student Developer Pack. (If you aren’t a student, you can use the details of a family member who is, as mentioned in the video). 5. Get Approved: Once your application is approved (usually within a few minutes), you’ll unlock the student benefits, including GitHub Copilot. 6. Access Premium Models: Open Visual Studio Code and use the Copilot chat/CLI. Click the model dropdown menu, and you’ll now have free access to premium models like Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.2-Codex, and more! Thanks to @bitsnlogic #claud #ai #gpt #viral #codingreels

Mar 06, 2026 5:18 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DR_o_2lE5Ty/
CaptionIn a world where work follows us everywhere — into our homes, our weekends, even our sleep — a new conversation has finally reached India’s Parliament. On 5th December 2025, a landmark proposal was introduced in the Lok Sabha: The Right to Disconnect Bill, 2025. This bill aims to give employees something we all deserve but rarely get… The freedom to log out. The freedom to say “not now.” The freedom to reclaim our personal time without fear of judgment or punishment. We’re not there yet — the bill is proposed, not implemented. But the fact that this discussion has officially entered Parliament shows how urgently India needs a healthier work-life balance. This is not just a bill. It’s a reminder that humans are not machines. It’s a pushback against burnout. It’s a step towards a future where productivity doesn’t cost peace, sleep, or family time. Whether this becomes law tomorrow or years later… The message is clear: It’s time to rethink the “always available” culture. It’s time to set boundaries. It’s time to disconnect — and breathe. #righttodisconnect #worklifebalance #newindia #employeerights #mentalhealthmatters #workculturechange #indianews #disconnecttoreconnect #modernworkplace #nomoremidnightemails #workstress #digitaldetox #trendingnews #workreform #humansnotmachines

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVORHB4Ambb/
CaptionYou can build and deploy full‑stack apps without paying by treating localhost as just the tutorial level and using free tiers wisely. Built a full‑stack app that only works on `localhost`? 😅 Here’s how to put it online for free: 1️⃣ Push everything to GitHub — this becomes your source of truth. If it’s not committed, it doesn’t exist. 2️⃣ Deploy the frontend to Vercel or Netlify — they auto‑build from your repo, give you a global CDN, HTTPS, custom domains, and basic scaling on free tiers. 3️⃣ Deploy the backend to a platform like Render.com / Railway / Fly.io — connect your repo, add env variables, and they host your APIs as managed services (no SSH, no manual servers). 4️⃣ Wire both to GitHub so every `git push` triggers new builds. Frontend on Vercel, backend on Render, DB on a free tier (like Supabase/Neon) = production‑style stack with zero server management. Localhost is not the finish line, it’s just Level 1. 🚀 Hashtags: #fullstackdev #vercel #netlify #render #deployment

CaptionThree years is not a long time. But it’s long enough to rebuild everything. Locking in doesn’t mean working 18 hours a day. It means focused, high-quality effort. It means understanding that the brain has limits, so the work must be structured. Fix the basics. Improve your diet. Identify your skill gaps. Match your abilities with real opportunities. Repeat daily without drama. Six months of consistency changes speed. One year changes confidence. Three years changes identity. Stay quiet. Build discipline. Let the results speak so loudly that the old version of you becomes unrecognisable. @theoryofpower #ShwetabhGangwar #SelfImprovement #Discipline #LockIn #3YearPlan FocusedWork

Jan 28, 2026 2:52 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DUAqMbQDJb-/
Caption✅ Explanation: Most people would use two nested loops to print this pattern. But here, only one loop is enough. 🔹 How this works (in simple words): 1. The loop runs from 1 to the length of "Hello". 2. printf("%.*s", i, "Hello") means: Print only the first i characters of the string. 3. On each loop: ○ First line prints H ○ Next line prints He ○ Then Hel, Hell, and finally Hello 4. Each iteration prints one more character. 📌 Why this is smart: • No inner loop • Uses printf formatting cleverly • Clean and short • Same output, less code ● More optimized version : char str[] = "Hello"; int n = strlen(str); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {     printf("%.*s", i, str);     printf("\n"); } ✅ Final takeaway: Sometimes formatting does the job better than loops. Simple. Clear. . . . . . #coding #programming #programmer #python #developer #javascript #code #coder #technology #html #computerscience #codinglife #java #webdeveloper #tech #webdevelopment #css #softwaredeveloper #webdesign #linux #programmingmemes #machinelearning #datascience #artificialintelligence #webdev #frontend #reactjs #codingisfun #developerlife #learntocode

URLhttps://youtu.be/OUK_Zb3Hof0?si=13j-_PAhFwZhO6v9
NameNoman
Usernameyomanverse
Jan 21, 2026 2:10 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DTvRWDDgQf-/
CaptionThis is not about competition. This is about health. It reflects a long ignored reality among Indian women and the cost of neglecting strength and nutrition for decades. For generations, women have been taught to eat less, prioritise everyone else, and believe that constant housework is enough to stay healthy. The result is visible today. Early joint pain, weak bones, low strength, poor balance, and declining independence are being normalised as aging when they are actually lifestyle outcomes. Housework involves movement, but it does not build muscle or protect bone density. Diets dominated by carbohydrates and taste, with minimal protein, gradually weaken the body. After the age of thirty, muscle mass naturally begins to decline. Without resistance training and adequate protein, this decline accelerates and leads to serious health consequences. India has one of the highest rates of osteoporosis globally, with the majority of cases seen in women. Low muscle mass and weak bones increase the risk of falls, injuries, and long term disability. Reduced muscle strength also slows reaction time, making even simple accidents dangerous as age increases. Strength training is about staying strong enough to live independently for as long as possible. Protein is not a trend or a gym concept. It is a fundamental nutrient required to maintain muscle, bone health, immunity, and recovery. Women in many countries remain active and independent well into their sixties and seventies because strength training and proper nutrition are part of their lifestyle, not an afterthought. The difference is not genetics. The difference is awareness and action. Change is possible at any age. Two to three strength training sessions per week combined with sufficient protein intake can dramatically improve quality of life. If you are a woman, prioritising your strength is self respect. If you are a man, supporting the women in your family to train and eat well is your responsibility. Strong women age with dignity, confidence, and independence. CaptionThe Visionary Behind Amazon's Empire Jeffrey Preston Bezos, born on January 12, 1964, in Albuquerque, New Mexico, is an American entrepreneur, investor, and space enthusiast best known as the founder of Amazon.com. Starting his career in finance on Wall Street, Bezos left a high-paying job in 1994 to launch an online bookstore from his garage-a risky move that would change the world of commerce forever. Under his leadership, Amazon evolved from a small book-selling website into one of the largest and most influential tech companies globally, revolutionizing e-commerce, cloud computing (through AWS), digital media, and logistics. His obsession with customer satisfaction, innovation, and long-term thinking earned him a reputation as one of the most forward-thinking CEOs of his time. Beyond Amazon, Bezos also founded Blue Origin, a private aerospace company aimed at making space travel accessible. In 2021, he stepped down as Amazon's CEO to focus on other ventures, including space expl . #stoicism #pycology #power #motivation

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DTCXlWljLUs/
CaptionBiomechanically, this is incorrect. Quad range of motion is determined by 1. Knee flexion 2. Hip flexion capacity 3. Ankle dorsiflexion 4. Pelvic and core control It is NOT determined by padding behind the spine. Adding a foam roller does not increase knee flexion. It does not change hip joint mechanics. It does not create real stability. What it does create is comfort and comfort is often mistaken for better movement. Posterior pelvic tilt during leg press occurs when, Hip flexion demand exceeds available hip ROM, Hamstrings pull the pelvis into posterior tilt, Core bracing fails under load, Ankle mobility limitations force compensation This is a pelvis control issue, not a spinal curvature issue. #navimumbai #fitnessmodel #fitnesscoach #reelviral #fitindia
CaptionBiomechanically, this is incorrect. Quad range of motion is determined by 1. Knee flexion 2. Hip flexion capacity 3. Ankle dorsiflexion 4. Pelvic and core control It is NOT determined by padding behind the spine. Adding a foam roller does not increase knee flexion. It does not change hip joint mechanics. It does not create real stability. What it does create is comfort and comfort is often mistaken for better movement. Posterior pelvic tilt during leg press occurs when, Hip flexion demand exceeds available hip ROM, Hamstrings pull the pelvis into posterior tilt, Core bracing fails under load, Ankle mobility limitations force compensation This is a pelvis control issue, not a spinal curvature issue. #navimumbai #fitnessmodel #fitnesscoach #reelviral #fitindia

Caption250 + Low Effort, High Protein and Vegetarian Recipes on my page! Join my gang because 2026 mein workouts bhi aane wale hai🔥 Ep 5 - Sassy Salads - Recipe ⬇️ Ingredients 🥗 1 medium size Guava 1/2 Steamed sweet potato - you can keep the skin to add more fibre, but I don’t like it that way :) 1 tbsp salted crushed peanuts Handful of fresh mint leaves ½ lemon juice ½ tsp red chilli powder ½ tsp roasted jeera powder ½ tsp black salt 1 tbsp imli chutney Prep Method - ✔️ Optionally roast the guava & chop it ✔️ Add steamed sweet potato, crushed peanuts, imli chutney & fresh mint ✔️ Sprinkle chilli powder, jeera powder & black salt ✔️ Squeeze in fresh lemon juice ✔️ Shake well and enjoy❤️ 🥗Tip - if you are carrying this to work, then add chutney, lemon juice and salt later. ✅ Should I do more high-fibre recipe recipes?⬇️ Tell meeeeee High fiber, spicy salads, protein, vegetarian recipes, quick recipes, healthy chaat, balanced meals

URLhttps://tally.so/r/pbbl1y
NameBruno Mihalko
Usernamebruno.mihalko
Dec 08, 2025 12:59 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRH76zDjJ21/
Captionगर्व से कहो हम भारतीय हैं 🇮🇳🇮🇳🇮🇳 The Punjab Kings dugout was filled with raw emotion on Tuesday evening as 24-year-old Priyansh Arya lit up the Mullanpur stadium with a breathtaking century against Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in IPL 2025. Yet, it was team co-owner Preity Zinta’s jubilant reaction that truly stole the spotlight—she jumped in celebration, her joy palpable as Arya scripted history. Arya, a left-handed batter hailing from Delhi, announced his arrival in grand fashion, smashing 103 runs off just 42 deliveries—a knock decorated with seven fours and nine massive sixes. His blistering innings made him the second-fastest Indian to reach a century in IPL history, achieving the milestone in just 39 balls. Only Yusuf Pathan’s iconic 37-ball ton from 2010 remains ahead. As Arya raised his bat after clearing long-on for a six to complete his century, cameras zoomed in on the Punjab Kings camp, where an elated Preity Zinta leapt to her feet, clapping and cheering along with the roaring crowd. Following Punjab Kings’ 18-run win, Preity Zinta caught up with the young star for a post-match interview. "Aapko mai ek din pehle mili thi to aapne ek shabd nahi bola tha, ekdum silent the aur aapne itni zabardast game kheli, so how is it? [I met you a day before and you didn’t say a single word—you were completely silent. And then you played such an incredible game, so how does it feel?]" Preity asked Priyansh. To which Arya replied with a smile: "Jab hum mile they to mujhe aapki baatein sunne mein maza aa rha tha isliye mai kuch bol nahi rha tha. Aur game ke baat karein to bahot achi feeling hai, out of the world feeling hai, top of the world feeling hai [When we met, I was really enjoying listening to you, that’s why I wasn’t saying much. And if we talk about the game, it feels amazing—like an out of the world feeling, a top of the world feeling]." Arya’s innings wasn’t just another power-hitting show—it was the result of a rising journey that’s been turning heads for a while. He first made headlines in the Delhi Premier League, where he slammed six sixes in an over en route to a blazing 120-run knock. That performance helped land him a ?3.8 crore IPL contr

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRfDlr7kzIs/
CaptionFULL WORKOUT (Save for later) 👇 Workout A: Full Body (Day 1) 1. Push ups (Difficult variation)3 sets of 5 reps 2. Rows: 3 sets of 15 reps. 3. Bulgarian spit Squats: 3 sets of 15 reps 4. Squat jumps or goblet squats: 3 sets of 20 reps 5. Abs superset: 50 crunches, 50 russian twists and plank hold for 2 minutes. Workout B: Full Body (Day 2) 1. Pull ups Or Assisted Pull ups - 3 sets of 5. 2. Push up (easier version) - 3 sets of 15-20 reps 3. Hip thrusts - 3 sets of 20 reps 4. Desi baithak - Total 100 reps, chahe jitne bhi set lage. Band baj jayegi 5. Hollow Body Hold – 3 x 30 sec hold Workout C: Full Body (Day 3) 1. Pike Push-ups or Pike Walks: 3 sets of 8 reps 2. Tempo rows: 3 sets of 8 reps. Focus on slow eccentrics 3. Romanian Deadlifts: 3 sets of 15 reps 4. 50 lunges on each side, 5. Bicep isolation: 3 sets of 10 reps 6. Tricep isolation: 3 sets of 10 reps And that’s it, Cycle through A, B, C every alternate day (Mon/Wed/Fri ya Tue/Thu/Sat), and watch your strength skyrocket, even without a gym. Follow @grover.fitness for more! . . . . . #homeworkout #workoutathome #strengthtraining

URLhttps://beacons.ai/sanchitgamedev
NameSanchit Sharma
Usernamesanchit.gamedev
Nov 26, 2025 9:48 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRhnMJ0ko9L/
CaptionIf you want to boost your testosterone naturally you must understand one simple thing. Your hormones respond to your lifestyle. If your routine is messed up your hormones will be messed up too. These are the most important precautions you should take if you want higher and stable testosterone levels. First reduce your exposure to plastic. Microplastics enter your body through delivery food boxes plastic plates plastic water bottles plastic shaker cups plastic chopping boards and even plastic wraps. These items release phthalates and other endocrine disrupting chemicals that directly lower testosterone. Use steel glass ceramic and wooden materials whenever possible. Second fix your sleep. Your body produces most of its testosterone during deep sleep. Late nights poor sleep and inconsistent sleep timing destroy hormonal rhythm. Avoid alcohol nicotine heavy caffeine and phone usage before bed. Third manage your body fat. Extra fat increases aromatase which converts testosterone into estrogen. Stay in a healthy body fat range to keep your hormones in balance. Fourth fix your deficiencies. Low levels of zinc magnesium vitamin D and omega 3 fatty acids are strongly linked with lower testosterone. Eat nutrient rich food get sunlight and supplement only if required. Fifth manage your stress. Chronic stress keeps cortisol high and high cortisol suppresses testosterone. Learn recovery techniques and stop living in constant fight or flight. Sixth train regularly. Resistance training improves both short term and long term testosterone. Build real strength and stay physically active throughout the day. Seventh reduce alcohol. Alcohol interferes with sleep increases cortisol and messes with your hormonal balance. Eighth limit highly processed food. Ultra processed food spikes inflammation increases body fat and disturbs metabolic health which ultimately affects testosterone. These small lifestyle fixes compound into powerful hormonal changes. Strong hormones stronger body stronger life. Follow @nitin_maurya_ for more [Health nutrition nutritionist mentality men lifestyle hormone strength survival speed aggression education awareness India masculine masculinity]

URLhttps://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfhAHOTPJOX5h6d985lRz8yxc_FSyiJW14d0qcajo0UcQMzkQ/viewform
NameNitin Kumar
Usernamenitin_maurya_
Nov 26, 2025 7:11 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRPZbNUiNoy/
Caption日本利用压电瓷砖将脚步转化为电能。这些瓷砖捕捉来自你脚步的动能。当你行走时，你的重量和动作会对瓷砖产生压力。瓷砖会轻微弯曲，从而产生机械应力。瓷砖内部的压电材料将这种应力转化为电能。每一步都会产生少量电荷，而数百万步结合在一起就能产生足够的电力来驱动 LED 灯、数字显示屏和传感器。在像涩谷车站这样繁忙的地方，每天大约有 240 万个脚步为这一系统作出贡献。这些电能可以被储存或立即使用，从而减少对传统电力来源的依赖，并支持可持续的城市基础设施。这种方法将日常运动转化为实用的可再生能源 #日本 #知识 #事实 #你知道吗 #推荐 #科技 #创新 #历史 #技术 #实验 #热门

URLhttps://linktr.ee/MaxKlymenko
NameMax Klymenko

Nov 23, 2025 1:39 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRTmzwvCXN4/
CaptionWe all have that one thing we’ve been delaying because we’re “not ready yet.” New job? Moving out? Breakup? Tough conversation? Starting therapy? Bro, even clicking “send” on a text can feel scary. But here’s the real truth: You don’t feel ready before doing the thing. You feel ready after you do it. Your nervous system works like an Indian parent — “Beta, risk mat lo… safe raho.” So anything new will feel uncomfortable at first. Your brain is trying to protect you, not upgrade you. That’s why you keep waiting for a feeling that never comes. Being ready isn’t a vibe. It’s a decision. Every person you think “has their life sorted” also started clueless and scared. They just decided to move anyway. So if you’ve been waiting for the perfect moment — It’s not coming. But your opportunity is already here. Take the step. Your courage will catch up. ⸻ #mentalhealthindia #psychologyfacts #therapyreels #readynotready #indianpsychologist #mindsetshift #selfgrowthjourney #healingjourney #anxietyhelp #youngadultsindia #comfortzonechallenge #innerwork #mentalhealthawareness #personaldevelopment #growthmindsetdaily #courageovercomfort #therapistsreels #psychologistsofinstagram #relatablecontentindia #lifeadvice #mentalhealthmatters #knowyourworth #decisionmaking #anxietysupport #reelsindia

URLhttps://drmaxbutterfield.com
NameMax Butterfield
Usernamedrmaxbutterfield
Sep 14, 2025 7:34 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DNQ7bZphUn9/
CaptionUnaware use = reflexively using your phone without noticing when or why you started. R u reading this caption because the video started to get boring? Ur gonna check the comments next huh? It’s ok. That’s your brain looking for more rustling leaves in the Savannah. If that doesn’t make sense, you just haven’t gotten far enough in the video yet. Force 1= tech companies. They get paid more $ the longer you stay here, so they wanna hook u. Bad. Force 2= about two thousand centuries of evolution. Your brain is hardwired to reward noticing novel, unexpected things. Your feed is a FLOOD of novel, unexpected things. The rewards feel so good, it almost feels like a trance-like state. Dont feel bad. We all have monkey brains. How do u think we got here?!!! But u can protect ur monkey brain. In the next video I’ll explain 3 tricks I used to get off of social media for 5 years. Like and follow and I will explainnnn

URLhttps://youtu.be/oHqitKqrhdM?si=b2GIEDpEV-yrYLCN
NameTechPulse_za
Usernametechpulse_za
Sep 14, 2025 6:10 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DOhwLzAkfSa/
Caption🚫 Never make these bathroom buying mistakes! Small decisions can save you from leakage, cleaning headaches, and wasted money. Here’s what to keep in mind when designing your dream bathroom: ➤ Shower ▫️ Choose a long common shower (not normal) → prevents seepage & leakage ▫️ Add a water sauna → avoids hair fall ➤ Basin ▫️ Go for under-mount (not top-mount) → counter cleans in one stroke ➤ Toilet Seat ▫️ Prefer wall-mount (not floor-mount) → easy to clean underneath ▫️ Select rimless + dual flush → hygienic & water efficient ➤ Mirror & Tap ▫️ Mirror with built-in light → makes getting ready easy ▫️ Wall-mount tap (not counter-mount) → cleaning is effortless ➤ Geyser ▫️ Pick horizontal geyser → hides neatly in false ceiling ➤ Flooring & Partition ▫️ Use anti-skid tiles (not glossy) → ensures safety ▫️ Large bathroom → add glass partition ▫️ Small bathroom → go for curtain partition ➤ Organizer ▫️ Always add a bathroom organizer → keeps space clutter-free ✅ Save this reel before you plan your bathroom 🛁 ✅ Share it with someone renovating their home! ( Bathroom Design, Bathroom Design Product Tips, Bathroom Design Tips, Bathroom Renovation, Interiordesign, Houmeindia ) #HoumeIndia #BathroomDesign #InteriorTips #bathroomdesigntips #bathroomdesignproducttips
Caption🚫 Never make these bathroom buying mistakes! Small decisions can save you from leakage, cleaning headaches, and wasted money. Here’s what to keep in mind when designing your dream bathroom: ➤ Shower ▫️ Choose a long common shower (not normal) → prevents seepage & leakage ▫️ Add a water sauna → avoids hair fall ➤ Basin ▫️ Go for under-mount (not top-mount) → counter cleans in one stroke ➤ Toilet Seat ▫️ Prefer wall-mount (not floor-mount) → easy to clean underneath ▫️ Select rimless + dual flush → hygienic & water efficient ➤ Mirror & Tap ▫️ Mirror with built-in light → makes getting ready easy ▫️ Wall-mount tap (not counter-mount) → cleaning is effortless ➤ Geyser ▫️ Pick horizontal geyser → hides neatly in false ceiling ➤ Flooring & Partition ▫️ Use anti-skid tiles (not glossy) → ensures safety ▫️ Large bathroom → add glass partition ▫️ Small bathroom → go for curtain partition ➤ Organizer ▫️ Always add a bathroom organizer → keeps space clutter-free ✅ Save this reel before you plan your bathroom 🛁 ✅ Share it with someone renovating their home! URLhttps://houmelifestyle.setmore.com/
NameSourabh Jain
Usernamehoumeindia
Sep 14, 2025 2:28 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DOQiYxIDy81/
CaptionComment ‘Link’ to receive the product links in your DM. 1.) Stainless steel Frypan: I can’t stress the importance of this pan in a kitchen. It’s everything you want from a pan and it will last you a lifetime. 2.) Aesthetic wooden bowls: Wooden serve ware is quite underrated and often limited to pizza boards, this bowl will change your perspective. 3.) Spice rack: This needs no description, the looks are enough for it. It organises your spices like no other. 4.) Glass Storage containers: If you’re someone who likes everything prepped on time and in its place like I do, you should definitely get a set of these. 5.) Deep plates: This is a personal one, but I love these plates, so versatile and they look like the fanciest thing. 6.) Dip Bowls: This one’s an essential for video creators like me, who like everything portioned out before preparing something. Thanks to @nestasia.in for being my favourite kitchen partner! [Product haul, favourite kitchen equipment, Arjun Narula, stainless steel frypan, aesthetic bowls and plates, spice racks, organisers, food containers]

Sep 03, 2025 8:16 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DNLtHb3podj/
CaptionPls don’t touch me 💔 CHICKEN FRIED RICE👇🏼 Ingredients: 1x lb chicken 10x Eggs 2x lb cooked rice 1/2 bunch green onion 1/2 minced garlic 1x small bag carrots & peas Teaspoon soy sauce . Scramble your 10x eggs and set to the side, cube your chicken, add spices and cook. Set to the side . Add your garlic and onion to a pan, cook for 1 min, add your rice, and stir. Add soy sauce, vegetables, chicken and eggs and mix . Divide into 5 and serve with optional limes for added flavor 🤝 . Comes out to around $1.70 and 40g protein! . Pricing is based on North Texas Walmart🤝 hope this helps!!!🙏🏼❤️

URLhttp://linktr.ee/vdvindy
NameVindy
Usernamevindy.andrianto
Sep 02, 2025 8:14 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DM4472YOUz9/
CaptionTake Control Of Your PC ⚡ Think your computer works for you? That’s what most people believe until they look closer. You didn’t ask for news gossip landing on your screen or cartoons clogging your search bar. Yet every day, these features slow you down and distract your focus. This isn’t about “personalizing” your desktop; it’s about stopping unwanted noise in its tracks. Why settle for a digital space designed by someone else, for their goals, not yours? If you want every click to count and your tech to serve your needs—not marketing agendas—it’s time to demand control. Make this the moment you switch from passive user to confident owner. Save this video for your next upgrade or when you’re roped into fixing someone else’s mess. Know a friend whose desktop proves chaos is real? Pass this on—they’ll thank you. Your PC, your rules. #customizePC #digitalminimalism #cleanworkspace #produtivitytips #windowssettings #taskbarcleanup #techsupport #PChacks #digitallife #takecontrol #modernworkspace #desktoporganization #clutterfree #personaltech #mindfultech #softwaretips #techtok #focusbetter #windows11tips #makeitclean #resetyourPC #cleansetup #ditchthedistractions #computerhelp #efficiencytips

URLhttps://bit.ly/492PyBO
NameJack the Handsome Devil
Username10.5billion
Aug 22, 2025 9:24 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DNdt-LyNBCC/
CaptionFollow @jerryjhlee and find your dream job today! Your dream job exists. It just has a weird name you’d never think to search for. Here’s the trick: - List out what you like doing at work and what you hate doing. - Feed that into a prompt. Prompt: Based on the following list of work activities I enjoy and dislike, identify unique and niche job titles that align with my preferences. Consider titles that might not be widely known but are specialized and tailored to these preferences. Avoid generic roles and instead focus on titles that highlight specific skills, industries, or emerging fields. It’ll spit out niche job titles that actually fit you—roles you’d never find by scrolling through @linkedin endlessly. Once you’ve got those roles, the next step is networking. Don’t worry if you don’t know any “Agrotechnologists.” That’s what tools like @networkaibywonsulting are for—they’ll help you connect directly with people in those exact jobs. Your dream job isn’t hidden. You just need to know how to look for it. Stitch with @naomii.nae

CaptionCrack Complex Equations with Clarity! In today’s reel, we break down a high-weightage Math concept that’s crucial for both NEET and JEE aspirants. Whether it’s algebra, trigonometry, calculus, or coordinate geometry — these aren’t just formulas to memorize, but tools to understand and apply. 🎯 What you’ll learn in this reel: ✅ Step-by-step approach to solving the equation ✅ Common mistakes to avoid ✅ Quick shortcuts to save time in exams ✅ Concept clarity that helps you tackle any variation of the question 🧠 No rote learning. CaptionLow Calorie High Protein Mayo Original Video: @hosseinfitness_ Recipe: 5 - Hard Boiled Egg Whites 1 tbsp - Olive Oil 1/2 tbsp - Worcestershire Sauce 2.5 tbsp - Vinegar or Pickle Juice Salt + Pepper to taste Method: -Place eggs in boiling water and let boil for 12 minutes - Place the eggs in a bowl of ice water to cool - Peel eggs, pop out yolks and add to blender - Add olive oil, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar/pickle juice, salt and pepper to blender - Blend & enjoy! Macros and calories: 242 calories per jar of mayo 18g protein 13g carbs 14g fats

Jul 14, 2025 4:38 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJUX0W8TZqI/
CaptionHIGH PROTEIN SMASH BURGER! Full recipe 👇 1. Slice a ton of onions. Cry. Caramelise them slowly (method mentioned at the end) 2. Make the sauce: Greek yogurt + ketchup + barbecue sauce + salt + chili. Done. 3. Skip store-bought mince meat. Blend 500g chicken breast, add salt, chili, black pepper & 3 grated garlic cloves. 4. Form into 5 loose balls. Smash in a hot pan with oil. Flip after 3–4 min per side. Add cheese on top. 5. Toast your buns, layer with sauce, lettuce, tomato, patties, caramelised onions, fried egg & pickles. Now, assemble. Add a fried egg and pickles (optional) for extra flavour. One patty = 34g protein Two patties = 56g protein And full-on joy in every bite. Once you try this, you’ll never go back to takeout burgers again. Save this and follow @grover.fitness for more! PS - How to caramelise onions (quick method): - Slice 2–3 large onions thin and evenly. - Heat 1–2 tsp oil in a pan on medium flame. - Add onions + a pinch of salt (helps release moisture) + 1 tsp sugar. - Cook on medium-low, stirring often, for 15–20 mins, and adding water midway to make sure it doesn’t stick - Once deep golden-brown and soft, take off the heat . . . . . . #chickenburger #smashburger #highprotein #healthyfood #homecooked

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DLUjF0kRUjU/
CaptionFULL GUIDE VIDEO ON MY FAVOURITE INDIAN HOMEGROWN BRANDS! 🇮🇳 ~ Trust me, we have it ALL in India. And I’m not even joking. A lot of your favourite International brands manufacture from India, yes even luxury brands and it begs me to question why we have to peep outside when we have it all in our country. This is like a FULL GUIDE video on ALL of my favourite Indian brands (I’m so sorry, I know I probably missed A LOT as well but I cannot fit so many in a video 🥲) If you want something classy, old money then you’ll definitely find it in this list and if you want something streetwear, avant garde, punk inspired then you’ll get that too! I have put EVERY price category from luxury, to mid-luxury, to mid-affordable & affordable too! 😆 LET ME KNOW IN THE COMMENTS BELOW YOUR FAVOURITE BRANDS AND I’LL DEFINITELY MENTION IT IN PART 2! also, do let me know what you’d like to see next, I read all comments! 😁✨ ~ BRANDS MENTIONED : @outbreaklab @prxkhxr @margnworld @rosaniworld @leada.in @_toffle @balavofficial @garuda_ss @six5sixstreet @jaywalking.in @__struct @aestheticofresistance @voidworldwide_ @erode.clothing @farakwear @croquisindia @leavetherest_ @dilli.disco.district @baroodiofficial @fourfigr @rkivecity @triune.store @_naushadali_ @kyd_archive @hshtg___ @noughtone01 @nuisance.in @blueprintofficial.in @daysforclothing @theseedstore @turntup.in @daysforclothing @byfetus @te.legacy @brahmetheus_ • • • • • • • • • • #reels #explore #explorepage #aesthetic #foryou #reelinstagram #reelsfashion #mensfashion #thriftstorefinds #outfitinspiration #mensstyle #indianbrand

Jul 05, 2025 12:30 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DLNKq3JSLKC/
CaptionThese conversations were had last night at the Level Up programme in Dehradun. The analogies used by my father, such as that of a hawker and selling tea and snacks point to his ultra humble beginnings. Beginnings that I can’t fathom. Beginnings that mean zero money in your pocket, being cloaked in modest clothing but donning a fierce desire to make something happen. The world has come a long way. We have crypto millionaires and successful traders with serious wealth. Baapu mine speaks from his perspective but shares something that seriously works.

URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DLr4x3kyHUE/
Caption26 Point checklist 👇 1. Carcass: BWP Plywood 2. Shutter: BWP Blockboard 3. Sink Area (Carcass & Shutter): WPC Board 4. European Kitchen (Carcass & Shutter): HDHMR Board 5. Finish Options: Paper-based laminate PVC laminate, Acrylic laminate, PU finish 6. Hardware: Tandem box with soft-close Innotech channel 7. Sink: Soundless handmade double bowl sink 8. Sink Mounting: Undermount 9. Above Sink: Dish rack + drain tray 10. Chimney Type: Filterless, 1400 m³/hr suction 11. Chimney Size:   • 2 ft – 2 burners   • 2.5 ft – 3 burners   • 3 ft – 4 burners 12. RO Placement: Undercounter 13. Countertop Height: 2 ft 10 inches 14. Clear Walking Space: Minimum 3.5 ft 15. Clear Space Below Counter Cabinets: 28" x 16" 16. Extra Space on Either Side of Chimney: 2 inches 17. Countertop Depth: 2 – 2.5 ft 18. Backsplash Height: 2 – 2.5 ft 19. Overhead Cabinet Height: 2.5 – 3 ft 20. Skirting (Toe Space): 4" x 3" 21. Pullout Drawer Width: Max 3 ft 22. Countertop Materials: Basic Granite, Premium Full Body, Luxury Quartz 23. Backsplash Options: Matching stone, Subway tiles, Moroccan, Tropical patterns 24. Kitchen Layouts: Straight, L-shaped, U-shaped, Parallel, Peninsula, Island 25. Skirting Sealing: Use PVC for easier maintenance 26. Waterproofing Layer: ACP sheet between wall and carcass (BWP side) Thank you Jadestone Architects

CaptionFOLLOW for more such facts 💪❤️ Ambernath is a city in Maharashtra, India, located in the Thane district. It is known for its rich historical and cultural heritage, including the 11th-century Ambernath Shiva Temple, a beautifully carved example of ancient Indian architecture. The city is part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region and is a growing residential and industrial hub, with a mix of modern amenities and historical significance. Ambernath also houses the Ordnance Factory, which plays an essential role in India's defense manufacturing. #ambernath #shiv #temple #history #dynasty

NameBoyonwhils

Apr 18, 2025 1:03 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DEIXNulCP6g/
CaptionFollow (us) @MOIST for more relatable reels 😔💙 I hope no ones needs to experience this 😔 Puss in Boots, the fearless and charismatic feline hero from the Shrek franchise and his own spin-off films, is depicted in a vulnerable moment as he lays on the ground with his hand over his heart, experiencing a panic attack. The scene portrays Puss struggling with the overwhelming weight of fear and anxiety, a stark contrast to his usual confident and daring persona. His rapid breathing and wide-eyed expression convey his inner turmoil as he battles feelings of helplessness, highlighting a rare glimpse of his humanity beneath the bravado. This moment of emotional depth resonates deeply, showing that even the bravest heroes are not immune to vulnerability, adding layers to his character and making him more relatable and endearing to audiences. #sadreels #relatable #heartbreak #fyp

Caption#वायरल #ट्रेंडिंग #रील्स 🇬🇧🏍️ IP प्राप्त करें! 2024 समाप्त हो चुका है, और यह वर्ष असाधारण होने जा रहा है! 🎉अधिक रेस, एक नया ट्रैक, और #MICHELIN पावर टायर इसे एक नए स्तर पर ले जाने के लिए तैयार हैं। 🚀और भी अधिक पकड़ और स्थिरता के साथ, हम ट्रैक पर कुछ वास्तव में रोमांचक और रोमांचकारी एक्शन के लिए तैयार हैं। एक्शन को रोमांचकारी होने दें।🏁🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🏍️ MotoGP के प्रशंसक, तैयार रहें! 2024 का मौसम अंतिम समय पर होगा, और यह वर्ष अपवादों से भरा होगा! 🎉प्लस डी कोर्स, नया सर्किट और हवा #MICHELINPower एक क्रैन की उत्तेजना को बढ़ाने के लिए तैयार है।🚀 अधिक से अधिक पालन और स्थिरता के साथ #वायरल ... #ट्रेंडिंग .... #रील्स ... 🇬🇧क्या #FrenchGP सप्ताहांत था🇫🇷 #MICHELINPOwer रेंज के टायरों की शानदार पकड़ और स्थिरता के कारण ट्रैक पर रिकॉर्ड , स्टैंड में रिकॉर्ड, अविश्वसनीय दौड़ से लेकर अविस्मरणीय क्षणों तक, यह एक बेहतरीन रेसिंग सप्ताहांत के लिए नुस्खा था। धन्यवाद ले मैंस, और अगले साल मिलते हैं! फ्रांस का ग्रांड प्रिक्स!🇫🇷 🇫🇷रिकॉर्ड

NameOtaldosamu Memes Edicoes
Usernameotaldosamu2001
Apr 09, 2025 11:19 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DFRrWTaIlUM/
CaptionReaching the end of the reel has become a ubiquitous experience in our digital lives. With the proliferation of social media platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, video content has become an integral part of our online interactions. As we mindlessly scroll through our feeds, we often find ourselves absorbed in a never-ending stream of videos, each one seamlessly transitioning into the next. And then, suddenly, we reach the end of the reel. It's a moment of subtle accomplishment, a fleeting sense of satisfaction that we've consumed a piece of content from start to finish. But it's also a moment of disruption, a jarring realization that our attention span has been manipulated by algorithms designed to keep us engaged. As we're forced to confront the end of the reel, we're reminded of the ephemeral nature of online content and the ways in which our digital habits shape our perceptions of time and space. Whether we acknowledge it or not, reaching the end of the reel has become an integral part of our digital rituals, a testament to the profound impact of social media on our daily lives. #instagrowth #memes

CaptionElon Musk breaks down entrepreneurship into straightforward steps, proving that launching a successful business is all about focus and execution: • Create a prototype: Build something tangible that clearly shows your idea. • Assemble a passionate team: Surround yourself with people who believe in your vision. • Embrace failure: Learn, adapt, and keep going, failure is part of the journey. Musk reminds us that action beats overthinking. Start where you are, figure it out as you go, and ask yourself: “What’s the worst that could happen?” Take the leap, adapt fast, and keep innovating. Caption"Love is a fragile thing woven from the same fabric as war. You think it makes you stronger, but often it reveals your greatest weakness... Just as easily as it lifts you, it can also break you down the same way. The world is full of those who seek love, yet so few understand it's true nature. It demands sacrifice. It feeds on vulnerability. It strips away the masks we wear to hide from ourselves. But perhaps that's why it matters... For in it's vulnerability, love forces you to confront the rawest parts of yourself, the pieces you'd rather ignore. The question is not whether or not love endures, but whether you have the strength to endure love's trials." 🔥Comment "UCHIHA" down below for a personal DM! #fyp #motivation #explore #motivated #love #truth

URLhttps://beacons.ai/amancyd/
NameAman | Content Marketing | Social Media Growth
Usernameaman.cyd
Oct 18, 2024 6:14 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C_le3cypQCG/
Caption5 reasons why your life is beautiful and worth living⬇️ 1. Unique Experiences: Life offers an endless array of experiences, from the joy of new relationships to the excitement of achieving personal goals. Each moment, whether big or small, contributes to the richness of your journey. 2. Connections with Others: The relationships you form with family, friends, and even strangers are a source of love, support, and joy. These connections remind us of our shared humanity and the importance of compassion and understanding. 3. Personal Growth: Life is a continuous process of learning and growth. Each challenge you face helps you become stronger, wiser, and more resilient. This journey of self-improvement is both fulfilling and empowering. 4. Beauty in the World: There is immense beauty in the world around us, from the wonders of nature to the creativity expressed in art and music. Taking time to appreciate these moments can bring a deep sense of peace and happiness. 5. Potential for Impact: You have the power to make a positive impact on the world, whether through small acts of kindness or larger contributions. Knowing that you can influence the lives of others in a meaningful way adds purpose and significance to your life. These reasons, among countless others, make life a precious and worthwhile experience.

NameSONAM TUTIONS😮‍💨🥰
Usernamesonam_ambernath
Oct 15, 2024 9:51 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C-TkpogS6oG/
CaptionGrinding my life like a video game but having a sense of self with integrity . While I am alive I might aswell try Journal Entry - Level Up Hello Readers, haven’t made one of these in a while. Hope you are doing well and I am feeling tired from this weekend but it is okay. This video was inspired by the quest I gave to myself to self improve like it is a video game. Intellect, strength, charisma, and personality is something I get the chance to work on since I am a living being. I am not maxed out at all and always looking to improve but I am glad I have some sense of purpose to who I want to be (what my stats I want). Intelligence is to be knowledgeable technically with my engineering career, skills, memory, intuition… comes in handy. But number one is emotional intelligence. Strength - physically I like to be strong, it makes things easier, healthier and just fun to lift heavy things. Mentally is the most important. Control over emotions and feelings. Push through fear, doubt, sadness and being able to stay mentally intact. Kind- the world could never have too much of it. Being kind to others doesn’t hurt anyone and it could help people. Being kind to yourself is for the relationship with yourself. Be kind Skilled for no reason - cuz why not just because it is cool lol Unapologetically themself - just be who you want to be and don’t care about what people want you to be. Be an outside, be your weird self and don’t feel bad for being different. Just don’t be someone who harms others while being yourself. Anyways much love bye #lifestyle #selflove #goalsetting

CaptionHow to become more likable ? 1. Show Genuine Curiosity About Your Prospects When you engage with prospects, start by asking thoughtful questions about their needs, challenges, and goals. Listen attentively to their answers, respond thoughtfully, and remember details for future conversations. This approach shows you truly care about their specific situation. 2. Build Trust Through Transparency Being upfront about what your product can and can't do, and always following through on your promises, is crucial. Regularly checking in and providing updates builds a strong foundation of trust, as it shows you're reliable and consistent in your communication. 3. Bring Positive Energy and Enthusiasm Maintaining a positive attitude, even when things get tough, and encouraging your prospects by showing confidence in their decisions can make a big difference. Showing genuine enthusiasm about your product and how it can benefit them can inspire your prospects and make interactions more enjoyable. . . . #fyp #fypシ #explorepage✨ #explorepage #foryou #zen #peace #life #people #resilience #discipline #motivation #consistent #consistency #trust #god #symphony #I #l #reels #instgram #viral

CaptionQOTD: Comment your favourite quote. 📚Power is an beautiful force. When you possess it, you gain the ability to influence and direct the course of events around you. This control naturally commands respect from those in your vicinity, fundamentally altering their perception of you. Consequently, this shift in how others view you begins to permeate your own sense of self, shaping both your personality and your behavior in profound ways. 📚However, acquiring and maintaining power is far from straightforward. It necessitates a deep understanding of the strategies and tactics essential for attaining and sustaining authority. This book stands out as an invaluable resource for anyone eager to master the intricate art of wielding power in various situations. 📚Indeed, the mental strategies presented within these pages are designed to offer a profound comprehension of human nature and the mechanisms through which it can be leveraged to your advantage. Equipped with such knowledge, you can navigate any scenario with confidence, ensuring that you remain in a position of dominance and that no one can undermine your authority. This mastery over the dynamics of power is not only empowering but also transformative, setting you apart as a leader who commands respect and wields influence effectively. ❤️Like 🔖Comment & 🚀Share 👉Follow @avinashshelf for more book reviews and recommendations. . ...... #everythingisfucked #thecompoundeffect #selfdevelopment #bookishpost #robinsharma #miraclemorning #quotesislove #nonfictionbook #booksbooksbooks #thesubtleartofnotgivingafuck #mustreadbooks #selfhelpbooks #richdadpoordad #bookcontent #awesomebooks #bookrecommendation #bookish #nonfictionbooks #48lawsofpower #thepsychologyofmoney #allthebooks #selfhelptips #readersofinsta #booksreview #successbooks #bookishcontent #selfdevelopmentbooks #selfhelpbook #jordanbpeterson #avinashshelf

CaptionDisregarded LLc - A disregarded entity is a type of business structure where a single-member Limited Liability Company (LLC) is treated as separate from its owner for legal purposes but not for tax purposes. Here’s what you need to know about disregarded LLCs🏢 Holding Company - A holding company is a type of business entity that owns a controlling interest in the shares of other companies, known as subsidiaries. The primary purpose of a holding company is to own assets in other companies rather than to produce goods or services itself. Name⚖️ WISDOM TARNISHED 💙🔱
Usernamehewho__pumps_iron
Jun 03, 2024 10:10 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C7wjZ_HSCQI/
CaptionWe often master the art of hiding our pain. Sorrow is an intrinsic part of life, sometimes profoundly so. We mask our anguish with smiles and laughter, concealing the battles raging within our minds and hearts from the world. But is it worthwhile to combat these sorrows in isolation, feeling utterly alone? We might hesitate to burden others with our sadness, but how long can we maintain the facade of being ‘fine’? Eventually, we may find ourselves on our knees, unable to keep up the brave face any longer. Our final laugh will seem almost ironic as we stand on the brink of losing our sanity. Those who can cry will shed tears, while others may fall into a haunting silence. The power of sorrow is immense, but we must acknowledge its presence. It lingers like a relentless companion who refuses to leave. So, let us confront it: wear a smile on some days, and allow ourselves to cry on others. But we must not let it destroy us. To all the courageous souls battling pain in solitude, remember—you are strong. You are not alone. You got this. #anandmovie #ranbirkapoor #bollywood #explorepage #fyp #viralreels #trending #rajeshkhanna #zindaginamilegidobara #srk #srkfan #edits #relatable #shahrukhkhan #sadedits #life #lifequotes #struggle #sadedits #pain #smile #shahidkapoor #shraddhakapoor #sadstatus #sorrow #solitude

URLhttps://www.amazon.in/dp/937164365X
NameRAHUL MAURYA
Usernamemauryarahulll
Apr 17, 2024 8:34 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C4IeVefCZ-X/
CaptionThe idea of saying the things you don't want to do in order to make them easier reflects a strategy known as "naming it to tame it" or "facing the discomfort." Here's a deeper exploration of this concept: Acknowledging and verbalizing the tasks or challenges that you find difficult or unpleasant can help diminish their psychological power over you. By bringing these tasks into the forefront of your awareness, you're taking the first step towards addressing them effectively. Verbalizing your reluctance or discomfort with certain tasks allows you to confront them head-on, rather than avoiding or procrastinating. This can be empowering, as it shifts your mindset from one of avoidance to one of action and accountability. Moreover, verbalizing your resistance to certain tasks can provide clarity and perspective. It allows you to examine the underlying reasons for your reluctance and explore potential strategies for overcoming them. This self-awareness can be instrumental in developing effective coping mechanisms and problem-solving strategies. Additionally, verbalizing your discomfort with certain tasks can help normalize the experience of struggle and challenge. It reminds you that everyone faces obstacles and difficulties at times, and that it's okay to feel hesitant or uncertain. This normalization can reduce feelings of shame or inadequacy, making it easier to seek support and assistance when needed. The idea of saying the things you don't want to do in order to make them easier reflects a strategy known as "naming it to tame it" or "facing the discomfort." Here's a deeper exploration of this concept: Acknowledging and verbalizing the tasks or challenges that you find difficult or unpleasant can help diminish their psychological power over you. In summary, saying the things you don't want to do in order to make them easier is a powerful strategy for confronting challenges, overcoming resistance, and fostering personal growth. By acknowledging and verbalizing your reluctance or discomfort with certain tasks, you can take proactive steps towards addressing them effectively, building resilience and achieving your goals. Follow @romanoism for more... #reels

CaptionI used to struggle with drawing Anime art, but then I discovered some incredible creators on YouTube: Art Senpai, Akihito Yoshitomi, Whyt Manga, Naoki Saito, and Tppo. They’ve become my Anime art heroes, guiding me through the process. If you’ve ever felt like you can’t draw a straight line, don’t lose hope! Enjoy the journey, embrace the process, and let’s see where it leads. You don’t need to be a genius; just practice with passion.
