URLhttps://www.instagram.com/channel/AbbaQJ5PfMJ23mBl/?igsh=MTc2endhYXk3c2t1NQ%3D%3D
NameMEN STYLE
Usernamemen.stylee._
Apr 09, 2024 7:13 am
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C4hIqW-p5T2/
Caption6 Strategies To Never Be Lazy⤵️ 1. Kaizen: Kaizen means making small improvements every day. Instead of trying to be perfect right away, you aim to get a little bit better each day. This approach is about setting small, reachable goals and slowly making progress. 2. Ikigai: Ikigai is about finding your purpose in life. It’s based on four ideas: - Do what you love - Do what you’re good at - Do what the world needs - Do what you can be paid for 3. Wabi Sabi: Wabi Sabi is about finding beauty in imperfection. Instead of looking for perfection, it’s about appreciating the imperfect parts of yourself, your body, and your life experiences. 4. Shoshin: Shoshin means having a beginner’s mindset. It’s about being open to new ideas and possibilities, like a beginner, rather than thinking you already know everything. 5. Ganbaru: Ganbaru is about being patient and doing your best. It means staying determined and working hard, especially when things are tough, to achieve your goals. 6. Shinrin Yoku: Shinrin Yoku, or forest bathing, is about spending time in nature. This practice can help reduce stress, improve your mood, and make you feel healthier overall. 🚀 If you aren’t following me you probably won’t see me again but if you are, you are learning everyday Are you ready to dominate 2024? Share this with a friend so they can see this too 💬 #discipline #consistency #growthmindset #2024goals #motivation #selfdevelopment #lifeadvice #healthylifestyle #entrepreneurship #mentalhealth #habits #focus #selfimprovement

Caption🌟 Link in Bio 🌟 :- ✨ Ingredients: 👉 1/2 cup of uncooked rice (white, brown, or any type you prefer) 👉 1 cup of water 👉 A clean bowl ✨ Instructions: 👉Start by rinsing the rice thoroughly to remove any impurities or debris. Place the rinsed rice in a clean bowl. 👉Add one cup of water to the rice. 👉Let the rice soak in the water for about 15-30 minutes, or until the water turns cloudy. 👉Gently stir the rice in the water to encourage the release of nutrients. 👉Strain the rice water into a separate container, ensuring you have separated the liquid from the rice. ⭐Your Korean rice water is ready to use. Store it in the refrigerator for up to a week . . #skincare #koreanstyle #koreanskincare #handsome #bodycare #perfectface #perfume #fragrance #exercise #diet #tipsbysp #tip #tips #healthyskin #health #benefit #yoga#workout #trending #trendingreels #trendingaudio #trendingsongs#korea #arab #inda #usa #

Captionबंबई मेरी जान: २ - written & directed by @thesharmaanshul ©️ I’ve been told that I’m a different person in poetry, maybe because they never asked me what I actually think or feel. I love this city and this reel has few of many visuals that move me, happy or sad, I don’t know. Sometimes I write to forget or get over things, not sure if that makes sense, but by the time I’m ready to face the world again, I’m a different person. URLhttps://linktr.ee/thesharmaanshul
NameAnshul Sharma
Usernamethesharmaanshul
Mar 30, 2024 6:39 pm
URL
https://www.instagram.com/reel/C4NnUiIyQyV/
CaptionTo build a strong decipline... Set Clear Goals: Define what you want to achieve in various areas of your life, such as career, health, relationships, etc. Break Down Goals: Divide your goals into smaller, manageable tasks or milestones. This makes them less overwhelming and easier to tackle. Create a Routine: Establish a daily routine that includes time for work, exercise, relaxation, and personal development. Stick to it consistently. Prioritize Tasks: Determine which tasks are most important and focus on completing them first. Use techniques like the Eisenhower Matrix to prioritize effectively. Stay Organized: Keep track of your tasks, deadlines, and commitments using tools like calendars, to-do lists, or productivity apps. Minimize Distractions: Identify and eliminate or minimize distractions that can derail your focus and productivity, such as social media, TV, or unnecessary notifications. Practice Time Management: Allocate specific blocks of time for different activities and avoid procrastination by starting tasks promptly. Practice Self-Control: Develop the ability to resist temptations and impulses that can lead you away from your goals. This may involve saying no to certain things or delaying gratification. Stay Consistent: Discipline requires consistency over time. Stick to your routine and habits even when it's challenging or when you don't feel like it. Monitor Progress: Regularly review your progress towards your goals and make adjustments to your approach as needed. Celebrate achievements along the way to stay motivated. Seek Support: Surround yourself with supportive people who encourage and hold you accountable for your actions. Practice Self-Reflection: Take time to reflect on your actions, habits, and mindset regularly. Identify areas for improvement and commit to making positive changes. By following these steps consistently, you can build strong discipline and achieve success in various areas of your life. . . . #motivationforsuccess #successchasers #quoteoftheday #successminded #motivatedmindset #mindsetofachampion #mindsetmentor #inspirationalquotes #hustleinsilence #hustlersquare #nevergiveup
